_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: In each case, a significant elevation in CO 2 production was observed in the experimental group relative to flies harboring either the heterozygous driver (Gal4/+) or effector (UAS/+) transgenes alone
details: Pan-neuronal knockdown significantly elevated CO2 production with two different Gal4 drivers (p < 0.001)
